review_title: Social Bee isn't the prettiest UI but it gets the job done well
description: I've used Social Bee for years now. I was an early adopter and I'm impressed with their progress. I'm a happy user of the tool and I would recommend it to others to use to manage their social media presence.
author: Megan B.
pros: I love that Social Bee actually helps you get the job done. It does what it claims to do and it does it well. It's affordable compared to some alternatives which is a huge bonus. They even have a mobile app now. Since I began using Social Bee I have seen the developers ship so many improvements, it's been really great to see. There's now integrations with most of the main social media platforms as well as integrations like Canva and other content creation tools. The analytics and reporting features are excellent. I think it's a great tool for anyone managing social media profiles, particularly social media managers who run client profiles.
cons: The only thing I have to say about Social Bee that I don't really love is the UI, it's not the prettiest tool available but it works and gets the job done. I think if they worked on the UI this tool would be way more popular than it is now.

review_title: Great tool for Automated social media posting!
description: Love Social Bee for making a bunch of posts before hand and having them automatically sent out to all my platforms. It really works with all the platforms I need and gives me a good amount of accounts I can use at one time.
author: Josh C.
pros: I love that it posts to social media automatically and I can make a lot of different posts and stagger them. I can also have it auto post from an integration with Pocket to show my audience interesting articles and other websites. I got it on an appsumo deal so I have an account and never have to pay monthly!
cons: Setting up pinterest is kind of a pain in the butt as they don't have their own integration you have to use hootsuite free account and integrate through that. Though it works well when you get it set up. Also having to re-connect integrations can be a pain in the butt, though this is from the social media platform side not a social bee issue.

review_title: No Refunds, Initially OK but system is fragile and stops posting with no notification
description: Initially very good, but a gradual buildup of problems. Far from the simple management it seemed at the beginning the system gradually collapsed under its own weight. Troubleshooting was like finding a needle in a haystack. I was shocked to find there was no refund policy.
author: Michael S.
pros: The apparent simplicity and the good range of social media covered. Reasonable cost either monthly or yearly
cons: No Refunds - even with 10 months left to go. . We used it for a year and went into the second year. I got so frustrated with their system eventually. They stop posting if one post has a problem. Posts are divided into categories and categories are scheduled. However if there is one misconfigured post in the category then the category stops posting. So the schedule grinds to a halt - there is no notification of this. And there is no way of seeing which post is causing hte problem ... you have to go through them all one by one to work out what the problems is. We had it all beautifully set up to find out a couple of weeks later than most of the posting was stopped. Then you have to go through posts one by one to find the problem - and it is guesswork. There is no indication of what the problem is specifically or where it is. Customer Support attempted to be helpful but didn't seem to grasp the extent of the problems.

review_title: Love this tool use it daily
author: Jess A.
pros: love how it automatically rotates through approved content for those days when I don't have something new
cons: hum? tough one - it does everything I want. I've tried others and missed my social bee

review_title: A powerful, to-be-polished product
description: It's a solid, reliable tool, despite the fact they have got many things to improve yet. There are so many social media management tools, that you might feel overwhelmed. But if you need advanced configuration, take a look at SocialBee.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I appreciate all the features focused on content management and schedule organization. With SocialBee, any kind of content plan should be doable. You decide what, when, where, how often, and how many times is going to be published. With all additional tools, it's a handy tool for social media managers, marketers, and entrepreneurs. And, what should not be forgotten, it's constantly growing!
cons: The interface sometimes is too confusing. It's easy to get lost among all tabs and features and forget where to go to find the right place. I also don't like how often the SocialBee wants me to try their Concierge program, which I don't need.

review_title: Best social media scheduling tool
description: SocialBee is a great social media scheduling tool. It supports all leading networks like Facebook (pages and groups), LinkedIn (Profiles and pages), Twitter, Pinterest, and Instagram to schedule and monitor content. Automated content recycling is another feature. It can re-publish content on connected profiles indefinite times.
author: Manoj V.
pros: SocialBee is my favorite tool for social media marketing. It helps me to automatically publish content on social sites at a scheduled time. The content can be organized across different categories so as to locate them easily at a later time. It also offers Twitter management feature to find new potential followers and detect unfollowers easily.
cons: They don't have a built-in Pinterest integration. But we can schedule content on Pinterest through Hootsuite. I contacted SocialBee support and they told me that it will directly connect to Pinterest very soon.

review_title: Great for recurring content and consistent visibility
author: Alys G.
pros: I love how I’m able to schedule recurring content for my social media platforms easily. By adding the posts to different categories I maintain complete control over what goes out when and can easily remove content that is no longer relevant
cons: No option to schedule first comments on Facebook and LinkedIn despite competitors (Smarterqueue and RecurPost) offering this

review_title: Social Media management easier than ever
description: The UI/UX is really nice, clean, and intuitive which I am a big fan of. The whole product is buttoned up really nice as it shows me the company really cares about its customers.
author: David K.
pros: Ability to manage all social accounts from one place. Also the ability to reuse content again to maximize the value of each social post.
cons: When I first started was a bit of a learning curve, but that is most software, I am still discovering new features 1 year later that I didn't catch right away.

review_title: Great for scheduling posts and saving time
description: Excellent experience and a good stable piece of software.
author: Fraser N.
pros: SocialBee is great and saves me a lot of time scheduling posts for the different social media platforms. I love the fact that I can can make amends to each post to suit each platform after I have written the main masterpost (e.g best practice is a maximum of 3 hashtags in LinkedIn so I would remove some for that post) and also store my common or used hashtags that add them to the post with just the click of a button.
cons: Nothing really yet - it does all that I need it to and I know I have not used all the features yet.

review_title: Unreliable experience with limited support and unclear pricing
description: Unfortunately, my overall experience was frustrating and disappointing. Lack of transparency, poor communication, and an inconsistent approach to pricing make it difficult to trust the platform. Any company offering discounts should honor them if their system accepts them. As a customer ready to invest in their highest-tier plan, I expected more professionalism and care. Based on my experience, I cannot recommend SocialBee.
author: Tobias F.
pros: The concept of the tool is promising, especially for small teams looking to manage their social media in a more structured way.
cons: Customer support is not available during daytime hours for users in Europe, which makes communication very difficult. The user interface is confusing and not intuitive. Most concerning, however, is the unclear and inconsistent pricing model. The website promotes strong discounts and annual savings, which technically work during checkout – but are later denied without explanation or apology. Even after pointing out an error on their side, it was only silently fixed without acknowledging the mistake. A publicly available 50% annual discount was accepted by the system, but after payment, my account was not activated. I was told afterwards that the discount was meant only for NGOs – which wasn’t stated anywhere during checkout. Again, no apology, no goodwill.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Socialbee - Solid Social Media Management Tool
description: I've been using SocialBee for a couple of years now and it's been great. It has lots of features that you can use to schedule posts, manage your content calendar, create lists or groups of social media profiles to post on all at once- the list goes on. There are so many things you can do with it, I'm sure I haven't even tapped into some of the features yet. If you're looking for a solid social media management tool, give it a try.
author: Richard S.
pros: I use socialbee to post to Twitter and Linkedin, but you can also post to Facebook, Instagram, Pinterest and Google My Business. You can use URL shorteners like Rebrandly, Bitly, RocketLink. JotURL. Replug or PixelMe so that you don’t have manually shorten URLs. Pocket and Quuu are also integrated and will allow you to automatically publish articles that you have saved there.
cons: It was a little difficult to figure out where to start. I felt like the layout of socialbee is not intuitive and can be confusing for someone new to it.

review_title: Great tool and easy to use!
author: Serene T.
pros: Using Socialbee is a breeze. We use it to schedule posts, make changes to our content and monitor our social media growth - all on one platform!
cons: Would be great if we could do hashtag research and advanced brand monitoring on the platform!

review_title: Helps me keep all of my social accounts active
description: I run a few social accounts across Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram and wanted to make sure all of my accounts were active for when potential customers visited them. I use SocialBee to set up posts at the start of the week and then I don't have to think about it until the following week
author: Ramy K.
pros: It's super easy to set up and works with all of the social networks that I need to post to
cons: Not much to be honest. The dashboard looks a bit dated, but it's functional and easy to use so it doesn't really matter
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Be(e) a smart little worker and automate your socials
description: Incredibly happy with the social planning aspects of this platform. some of the best scheduling around with an easy to manage calendar view. Section differentiation would make it perfect.
author: Jason B.
pros: RSS feed conversion into social posts is amazing. Combined with the overall social planner aspects of this platform, and you have a winning solution.
cons: Some of the interface takes more getting used to than I'm used to. This is mostly due to certain sections looking too similar to each other.

review_title: Social media management platform
author: Lukas H.
pros: Easy to use social media management scheduling with a suite of tools for multiple platforms.
cons: I found the interface a little cluttered at times.

review_title: Could be amazing but needs some fixes
description: Even though it is a great program, there are major flaws they need to figure out.
author: Julie S.
pros: What I love about socialbee is it has content categories. Many other schedulers don't categorize by content. Through the years there are more integrations and collaborations happening with it. Of course it is web-based which has its own pros and cons. I like the fact that you can start a post in bulk and then customize for each social media platform.
cons: When I go to write a post, once I have put a photo on, the link, as well as the tags then the whole program slows down like we are back in the 90s on dial up. This means to fully complete one post it can take up to 45 minutes, even on a fast computer. This has put me off using it almost completely and demotivates me from keeping my posts new.

review_title: Ultimate tool for social media growth on-the-go
description: ​ SocialBee is an absolutely amazing tool to use for social media - it allows you to schedule content, post from one place, and even grow your following with just one tool! With the help of SocialBee, we've been able to post and engage with our followers like never before, which has resulted in a lot of knowledge about our audience that we use to guide decisions for our platform. So, when you're trying to automate the social media posting process, and get the most engaged followers possible, SocialBee is the tool for you!
author: Jean Bertin C.
pros: SocialBee was one of the first favorite tools we use in our agency for social media marketing and management. It is a powerful tool that has helped us tremendously to schedule posts, grow our following, and increase engagement. With one tool, we are able to automatically send personalized mentions to followers and automatically send personalized messages. With the different content categories available on SocialBee, we can keep followers entertained with a wide variety of posts that will keep them coming back for more. The app has been designed with the modern marketer in mind. With SocialBee, marketers can now use a powerful tool that will provide them with a sufficient solution for building their brand on social media without having to spend too much time and effort on this task. It provides the ability to create several workspaces that you can customize to your preferences, has a great hashtag manager, and supports RSS feeds. As more and more people are turning to social media for their daily dose of information and entertainment, it is important for brands to be present here as well serve your followers with what the want and need. One of the best features of SocialBee is its capability to post evergreen content on autopilot. This means that it will post high-quality evergreen content on your behalf, every day, while you focus on other important tasks
cons: The main reason why we implemented other Social marketing platforms along side with Social is their unability to have a built-in integration for some of the social platforms such as Pinterest. the only option to schedule content on Pinterest for instance is through Hootsuite. This was the same for Instagram initially but they have been able to correct the Instagram integration but not that of Pinterest. I would love to see YouTube as a part of the integration, but it is not viable at this time. On the other hand, the inbuilt link shortners are not reliable . Other than that SocialBee is a solid marketing tool in any marketer toolbox.

review_title: Great option to manage social media posts of various accounts
description: It is great tool that allows me to save time and makes it easy to post social media content for various accounts and on various platforms at the same time. Great investment!
author: Erica H.
pros: I love that we only have to open 1 tab on the computer and you can generate content for all social media accounts in one click. The AI generator is great addition that has really helped overcome writters block o to give new ideas on al ready posted content. I also really apreciate that you can post to Facebook and Instagram in one click! And it is really handy to be able to save groups of hastags.
cons: The only complaint I have is that there sometimes is a glitch when setting up the automatic posts that grabs content from previous posts. Sometimes it will pick the same post over and over, posting multiple times in the same week. But probably it is just some setting I have to adjust.

review_title: Amazing automation tool for SEM
description: Cool web and mobile app to keep track of your company's daily SEM activities
author: Roli P.
pros: The best part about Social Bee is it's ability to support multiple platforms on the go
cons: Nothing as such, it's just the best tool in the market

review_title: Solid and stable platform
description: Overall the experince has been good to be honest but they still need to work. They have achieved the technicall stability but still to incorporate innovate features also using Ai which is the future I guess.
author: Ashutosh A.
pros: I really love the way the product has been designed. I didn't experience any bug, integration was smooth, scheduling and publishing is superb.
cons: The UI should me more intuitive, content management isn't that updated like other software's in the market. Need some good AI for putting the publishing on steroid.

review_title: A Must Have For Social Media Marketing
description: I use SocialBee daily to manage multiple brands, and it automates most of my social media marketing needs.
author: Patrick D.
pros: Robust features and integrations make this an all-in-one tool for social media marketing and management.
cons: There is an initial learning curve when switching from another tool, but not too bad.

review_title: Social Bee lacks a innovative Queen
author: Coën V.
pros: - helpful support - many social channels are supported if only they are better implemented… - active development
cons: - the UI is less likely to be intuitive rather it is distracting - the use of third party apps to be able to publish for certain social channels make this tool somewhat questionable - learning curve which in this case is not fun - competition is fierce and although socialbee is constantly improving, their old issues that user have remarked aged ago still persist

review_title: Using Social Bee I am successfully maintaining multichannel social accounts for my two businesses
author: Kazi A.
pros: Social Bee makes my social media marketing efforts easy and smooth. From the one dashboard, I can control all of my social media as well as use analytics to get the marketing overview and results. This is the best part of Social Bee to me.
cons: The UI could be more slick and handy. A better UI could make this more attractive to the user.

review_title: SocialBee. The best at what she does,
description: So far it's been doing a good job, and I easily find the tools I need to use, great social media control tool.
author: robson B.
pros: It's the best tool I've found to schedule, and it gives support in several networks that I work, the company is on the way to consolidate itself as one of the best in the field in which it operates (social media), support and trust when using it. And supports multiple platforms and operating systems.
cons: They don't have integration with Pinterest. the lack of direct posting on instagram doesn't help either

review_title: Socialbee review
description: Overall my experience with socialbee is great.
author: bimal C.
pros: Socialbee is a great social media marketing tool because I can easily schedule all my tweets in advance and it will share at the best time. Result more engagement that helps to bring lead and sales. You also can find clients just by searching any kind of keywords like dentist,accounting etc. Its analytics show you how your tweet is performing so you know where to improve it.
cons: I didn't find any cons with socialbee right now.
